Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x47C6 "THUNDERBIRDS-FIREBIRD-07D3-47C6" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $07d3 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Thunderbirds (Firebird).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $07D3 to setup the correct VICII display settings
